title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
